text:
INCIDENT REPORT #001
Facility: Plant 4 - Odessa
Asset: Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6
Severity: MEDIUM

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed an unexpected trip on high bearing temperature
on the Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 19.7 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause was determined to be bearing wear beyond tolerance.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Replacement parts ordered and repair scheduled.
